title: Australian Meat Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this recipe combines the flavors of Australia with the comfort of a taco. The xtra juicy beef is marinated in a umami-rich sauce and served in a chewy taco shell.

ingredients.name: umami sauce
ingredients.notes: such as soy sauce or fish sauce

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: such as cheddar or Monterey Jack

instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground beef, xtra virgin olive oil, taco seasoning, and umami sauce. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Form the beef mixture into 8-10 patties.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the beef is cooking, toast the taco shells on the grill or in the oven.
Assemble the tacos by placing a cooked patty onto a toasted shell, followed by shredded cheese, sliced avocado, sliced lettuce, and diced tomatoes.
